patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/planner/operators/SubQueryResults.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['import java.util.HashMap;', 'this(valuesBySubQuery, EMPTY_OUTER_COLUMNS);', 'private SubQueryResults(Map<SelectSymbol, Object> valuesBySubQuery,', '// Correlated subquery related fields, expect only one of them to contain correlated subquery fields.', 'assert subQueryResults1.boundOuterColumns.isEmpty()', '|| subQueryResults2.boundOuterColumns.isEmpty()', ': "Can\'t merge two SubQueryResults with non-empty boundOuterColumns";', '', 'assert subQueryResults1.inputRow.equals(Row.EMPTY)', '|| subQueryResults2.inputRow.equals(Row.EMPTY)', ': "Can\'t merge two SubQueryResults with non-empty inputRow";', '', '// Fully merge regular sub-select field.', 'Map<SelectSymbol, Object> mergedValuesBySubQuery = new HashMap<>();', 'mergedValuesBySubQuery.putAll(subQueryResults1.valuesBySubQuery);', 'mergedValuesBySubQuery.putAll(subQueryResults2.valuesBySubQuery);', ''], removed_lines=['this.valuesBySubQuery = valuesBySubQuery;', 'this.boundOuterColumns = EMPTY_OUTER_COLUMNS;', 'public SubQueryResults(Map<SelectSymbol, Object> valuesBySubQuery,', '// Correlated subquery related fields.', '// Regular sub-select field.', 'Map<SelectSymbol, Object> mergedValuesBySubQuery = subQueryResults1.valuesBySubQuery;', 'if (mergedValuesBySubQuery.isEmpty()) {', 'mergedValuesBySubQuery = subQueryResults2.valuesBySubQuery;', '}'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
